default.text: ⟦⟦ P̃ãỹ ãt̃t̃ẽñt̃ĩõñ t̃õ f̃l̃ĩc̃k̃ d̃ĩr̃ẽc̃t̃ĩõñs̃ t̃õ ãṽõĩd̃ m̃ĩs̃s̃ẽd̃ ĩñp̃ũt̃s̃. ⟧⟧

frequent.text: ⟦⟦ F̃l̃ĩc̃k̃ ñõt̃ẽs̃ ãp̃p̃ẽãr̃ f̃r̃ẽq̃ũẽñt̃l̃ỹ,̃ r̃ẽq̃ũĩr̃ĩñg̃ c̃õñs̃ĩs̃t̃ẽñt̃ d̃ĩr̃ẽc̃t̃ĩõñ c̃õñt̃r̃õl̃. ⟧⟧

direction_change.text: ⟦⟦ Q̃ũĩc̃k̃ d̃ĩr̃ẽc̃t̃ĩõñ c̃h̃ãñg̃ẽs̃ ĩñ f̃l̃ĩc̃k̃s̃ c̃ãñ d̃ĩs̃r̃ũp̃t̃ r̃h̃ỹt̃h̃m̃ ĩf̃ r̃ũs̃h̃ẽd̃. ⟧⟧

tight_timing.text: ⟦⟦ F̃l̃ĩc̃k̃ t̃ĩm̃ĩñg̃ w̃ĩñd̃õw̃s̃ ãr̃ẽ t̃ĩg̃h̃t̃,̃ l̃ẽãṽĩñg̃ l̃ĩt̃t̃l̃ẽ m̃ãr̃g̃ĩñ f̃õr̃ ãd̃j̃ũs̃t̃m̃ẽñt̃. ⟧⟧

fatigue.text: ⟦⟦ R̃ẽp̃ẽãt̃ẽd̃ f̃l̃ĩc̃k̃ ĩñp̃ũt̃s̃ õṽẽr̃ t̃ĩm̃ẽ c̃ãñ ĩñc̃r̃ẽãs̃ẽ h̃ãñd̃ f̃ãt̃ĩg̃ũẽ. ⟧⟧
